cells.rationale: Load-bearing early-proof task with a subtle TOCTOU liveness invariant, a backward-compatible intent-schema change, and a new dwell/startup-window design that sets the approach for the sibling task, so it clears the opus correctness-invariant gate at the contract-touching xhigh band.

Well-specified with an in-repo sibling deriver to mirror, but the fail-direction reconciliation across two consumers plus the never-throws and re-fold-determinism invariants are delicate keeper idiom that sonnet matches best at the known-pattern high band.
Near-mechanical display-only string change with a fully-nameable acceptance whose only care is grepping and updating all pinned fixtures, routing GPT-first at the do-exactly-this medium band.

Mirrors an existing periodic-timer template but must honor keeper's sacred worker-contract, sole-writer, and no-self-heal invariants plus bound the .gc trash, which is delicate in-repo idiom matching favoring sonnet at the known-pattern high band.

Under-specified investigation whose named candidate emitter is explicitly ruled out, so success hinges on a log-grep diagnostic hunt with no confirmed hypothesis before a mechanical coalescing fix, routing to sonnet for the open-ended judgment at a high investigation band.

Well-specified backup cadence/checkpoint tuning with explicit guardrails (no events table, no SCHEMA_STEPS) and a clear restore-safety bar plus standard SQLite pragma reasoning, fitting the GPT workhorse at the multi-consideration high band.
